current_wind.description: 16 mph from SE, gusts to 21 mph

bh.shot_strategy: With a 6 o'clock tailwind pushing your disc forward and away from the OB, a controlled RHBH with an understable disc can offer maximum distance and a straight flight path towards the basket for Hole 1.

fh.shot_strategy: A RHFH with a stable disc will fight the tailwind effectively on Hole 1, allowing for a straight flight and good control, keeping you clear of the OB behind.

bh.shot_strategy: A left-to-right curving LHBH can use the tailwind on Hole 1 to its advantage, offering a smooth flight that finishes towards the basket without risking the OB to the right.
